name: Taylor, MJ Hegar Campaign
subject: just one in six
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're working hard to build the Texas-sized campaign we'll need to beat Senator Cornyn, but we have to hit every single goal we set if we're going to win.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890793/7f51f7bc/4affde2e/4ef02ff8/1016691250/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter -- I'll get straight to the point. I'm asking you to chip in $5.

**We 're just 37 days from early voting and we aren't on pace to hit our January goal. [We need your help to turn it around: can you give $5 right now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890793/7f51f7bc/4affde2e/4ef02fff/1016691250/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200112.3nd__740__&amount=5&recurring=true")**

If just one of every six people reading this message donated we'd be right back on track.

We're working hard to build the Texas-sized campaign we'll need to beat Senator Cornyn, but we have to hit every single goal we set if we're going to win. That includes this one. **[Will you be part of that effort by pitching in $5?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890793/7f51f7bc/4affde2e/4ef02fff/1016691250/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200112.3nd__740__&amount=5&recurring=true")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Wendy Davis
subject: Falling behind our first 2020 goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Our deadline is midnight tonight, and we're still not quite there yet
Here's the deal, friend: We started 2020 with a goal to reach 5,000 new Pink Sneaker Squad members. But our deadline is midnight tonight, and we still need 987 supporters to activate their memberships.
I'm running to flip this seat because extremist Republicans refuse to do right by families like yours and mine. And I don't know about you - but I don't want to wake up the morning after Election Day 2020 wishing I'd done more when I had the chance.
Friend - _now_ is our chance. **Will you give $3 or more right now to join the Pink Sneaker Squad, flip Texas blue and expand our House majority?**
Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk29-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Thank you,
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aef/704929dc/1613cc71/39938b88/1080938794/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aef/704929dc/1613cc71/39938b8b/1080938794/VEsF/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aef/704929dc/1613cc71/39938b8a/1080938794/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
---

body:

| Hi Team,

We know it's late so we'll keep this short. On Friday we announced we needed to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight to stay on track to hit our $700,000 goal Thursday.

Right now, we're still $31,000 short with only a few hours to go.

[If everyone reading this email chipped in $29 we'd hit our goal. name: Booker HQ
subject: No diversity on this debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| You won't be seeing much diversity on that stage. Team, Did you see this note? The DNC's debate thresholds are having the effect of blocking candidates of color from the debate stage. But that's not going to stop Cory from speaking out about the important issues in this election. **[If you believe that Cory should've been one of the candidates on the January debate stage, please chip in here. We need his voice in this race.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200112_BHQ_20200112-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Even though he won't be on the debate stage, he's still going to keep sharing his vision to repair the damage Trump has done and make justice and opportunity real for every American. Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, Today is the deadline to qualify for the DNC's January debate. Once again, it's looking like we're going to see a debate stage next week that doesn't reflect the true diversity of our party. I know I've written to you about this topic a few times now -- and it pains me to have to do so. But, it is deeply problematic that a Democratic primary field that started as the most diverse in history will almost certainly feature no candidates of color in the next debate. **This lack of diversity doesn 't represent the ideals of our party -- and it doesn't represent the ideals of our country.** The DNC's debate thresholds have had the effect of cutting off access to the debate stage for candidates of color who deserve to be heard in this election. There have barely been any polls in the field that would allow a campaign like ours to demonstrate momentum and qualify for the debate. **I 'm going to keep speaking out about this and forcing our party to have the difficult discussions we need to be having. If you're with me, please chip in.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200112_BHQ_20200112-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200112_BHQ_20200112-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_express10&amount=10&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200112_BHQ_20200112-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_express22&amount=22&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200112_BHQ_20200112-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_express50&amount=50&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200112_BHQ_20200112-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_express100&amount=100&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200112_BHQ_20200112-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_expressother&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

At the December debate, it was clear that not nearly enough attention was devoted to the challenges facing communities of color. We can't let these important issues be left out of the conversation.
I plan to keep fighting and making my case directly to voters and caucus-goers in the early states. **[I'd be grateful if you can chip in now to help us do it.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200112_BHQ_20200112-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I'm in this race to win -- because I believe that I can unite the diverse coalition we'll need to defeat Donald Trump this November.
Together, we will rise.
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200112_BHQ_20200112-fr-BHQ-EM2-SS_SS_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fd8/5fca0d19/7a95d72a/291d20d4/3363479770/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fd8/5fca0d19/7a95d72a/291d20d3/3363479770/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fd8/5fca0d19/7a95d72a/291d20d2/3363479770/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fd8/5fca0d19/7a95d72a/291d20d1/3363479770/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fd8/5fca0d19/7a95d72a/291d20d0/3363479770/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fd8/5fca0d19/7a95d72a/291d20d4/3363479770/VEsHAA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Lauren, TomSteyer.com
subject: Your Tom 2020 Sunday Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hi there! My name is Lauren, and I’m the National Latino Outreach Director at Tom 2020. I support Tom because he’s organizing and leading on the most important issues of my generation — climate change, economic justice, and immigration reform. Here are the top highlights from the campaign this week: 🗓️ Mark your calendars: Tom is headed to his **fourth Democratic debate!** This Tuesday, January 14, Tom will take the debate stage in Iowa, just three weeks before Iowans go to caucus. clean_body: | | | | Hi there! My name is Lauren, and I’m the National Latino Outreach Director at Tom 2020. I support Tom because he’s organizing and leading on the most important issues of my generation — climate change, economic justice, and immigration reform. Here are the top highlights from the campaign this week: 🗓️ Mark your calendars: Tom is headed to his fourth Democratic debate! This Tuesday, January 14, Tom will take the debate stage in Iowa, just three weeks before Iowans go to caucus. 📃 On Friday, which will reform our current legal system and replace it with one that is centered on the values of family, fairness, unity, and freedom. Tom’s plan will end abuses within the system like the destructive separation of families. Our asylum and refugee system will reinforce that people fleeing persecution, violence or extreme poverty are treated by our country with dignity and respect, and our laws will be updated to account for the climate refugees. I am grateful to have had the opportunity to help build this plan with the input of leaders on the ground advocating for a just and fair immigration system. I know Tom will put a stop to inhumane immigration policies and unite our country by embracing our greatest strength: our diversity. ⏱Time is ticking down to the primary — Don’t let anything get in the way of this important election! 🛋 Know how you can really help this campaign from the comfort of your own couch? Sign up for a phonebanking shift! We’re calling voters in the early states to get them ready to stand with Tom in the upcoming caucuses and primaries. 🔥 showing what everyone has been talking about: our momenTOM! Questions, comments, ideas? We’d love to hear them! Shoot us an email at: mailto:info@tomsteyer.com. — Lauren Lauren Perez-Rangel National Latino Outreach Director Tom 2020 | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering, . If you want to be a delegate for Tom at the DNC convention in Milwaukee next July, . To update your contact information, . If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking == — we’ll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()

name: Team Yang
subject: We might not hit our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Don’t let us fall short. Rush a donation now.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5826%2E377263%2ETRPCFg) Yang Gang --

We had a record-breaking 4th quarter in 2019, but fundraising has slowed to a trickle. For the first time ever -- we might not hit our goal.

[Don’t let us fall short of our $2 million goal before our deadline. Rush a donation of $10 or more now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21776?t=5&akid=5826%2E377263%2ETRPCFg) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21776?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5826%2E377263%2ETRPCFg)

We shocked the pundits and press the last time we hit our big goal. They didn’t think we could do it even once. Now they’re watching and wondering if we’re going to fail this time.

We cannot let that happen, Yang Gang.

If just 5% of everyone who opens this email gives $10 or more, we’ll hit our goal with days to spare.

[Can Andrew count on you? Don’t let him down. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21776?t=13&akid=5826%2E377263%2ETRPCFg)
[Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21776?t=14&akid=5826%2E377263%2ETRPCFg)

Let’s do this!

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21776?t=6&akid=5826%2E377263%2ETRPCFg)

name: Warren for President
subject: A note about recent news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
No matter what, we'll keep running to unite the party and defeat Donald Trump. We'll be spending our time taking selfies (100,000 and counting!), holding more town halls and public events, and... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb0f/45c30650/1ef3a2229/66ff01dd/3813989965/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Last night, we got some disappointing news.

Bernie Sanders' campaign is instructing volunteers to dismiss our broad-based, inclusive campaign by saying the "people who support [Elizabeth] are highly-educated, more affluent people."

When I heard that description, I didn't recognize it. That doesn't describe me or many of the passionate volunteers and organizers I know. This type of attack isn't about disagreeing on issues -- it's about dismissing the potency of our grassroots movement.

Let's be clear: As a party, and as a country, we can't afford to repeat the factionalism of the 2016 primary. To win in November, we need a nominee who can unite a broad coalition of Democrats -- who will excite every part of the Democratic party and inspires more people to join the fight.

**[If you want the Democratic primary to be about a substantive vision for a country that works for everyone, I'm asking you to support our campaign with a contribution right now.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb0f/45c30650/1ef3a2229/66ff01df/3813989965/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjQ5Rl9SRVNfSERMX1BfMjAyMDAxMTJfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN49F_RES_HDL_P_20200112_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb0f/45c30650/1ef3a2229/66ff01df/3813989965/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjQ5Rl9SRVNfSERMX1BfMjAyMDAxMTJfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN49F_RES_HDL_P_20200112_V1S1_P")

>
Here's why this is personal for me: My parents were immigrants from China who both worked two jobs to pay their bills. They waited tables, sold souvenirs, sewed clothes, and did everything they could to give my brothers and me a better life. I dropped out of high school but got back on track, got my GED, and graduated from a state school.

Now, I'm Elizabeth's campaign manager. She's lived the American dream too -- growing up in Oklahoma, her family barely hanging onto its place in the middle class, getting a degree from a commuter college for $50 a semester, becoming a teacher, professor, senator, and candidate for president.

We're fighting to open doors for the next kid to get ahead. And everytime I'm out on the road with Elizabeth, I see her inspiring new people to join the fight, because in her story, they see themselves, and in her plans, they see a path out of the mess we're in as a country.

I have all the respect in the world for Bernie Sanders, but when talking about our movement, his campaign has it backwards. I hope he reconsiders what he's encouraging.

**No matter what, we 'll keep running to unite the party and defeat Donald Trump.**

We'll be spending our time taking selfies (100,000 and counting!), holding more town halls and public events, and building on our grassroots-funded movement -- one that's powered by more than 2.7 million contributions from nearly 1 million donors chipping in to something they believe in.

And in the final days before the Iowa caucuses, we'll be knocking on doors, making calls, and having thousands of meaningful conversations with people all across the country to get as many people involved and out to the polls and caucuses as possible. **That 's how we win in 2020. And that's how we deliver big, structural change in 2021.**

**[If that 's the type of campaign you're proud to be a part of, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to help keep up the fight.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb0f/45c30650/1ef3a2229/66ff01df/3813989965/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjQ5Rl9SRVNfSERMX1BfMjAyMDAxMTJfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN49F_RES_HDL_P_20200112_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for everything, and I hope to see you on the road. -roger

Roger Lau
Campaign Manager
Warren for President

P.S. If the Bernie campaign's description rang false to you too, **[we'd love to hear your story. What brings you into this fight, and what issues do you care about?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb0f/45c30650/1ef3a2229/66ff0036/3813989965/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU40OUZfUkVTX0hETF9QXzIwMjAwMTEyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-storyshare?source=EMN49F_RES_HDL_P_20200112_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

name: Tina Smith
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I am about to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our very first fundraising push of the year. Will you let me explain?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200112-mm4?refcode=em200112-mm4&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our very first fundraising push of the year. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important.

The truth is, we are behind on our grassroots fundraising target for 2020 and we're only a few days in. January is pretty terrible for this sort of thing -- especially with folks just getting back into the swing of things and fully tuning back in after a much-needed holiday break.

With so much going on in Washington, I need to stay focused on fighting for our progressive values in the Senate and making sure Democrats don't lose this seat (and with it, virtually any chance to flip the majority).

But trying to keep Minnesota blue and doing my job to protect our health care, defend reproductive freedom, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more has left me with very little time to worry about anything else.

The good news is that my team has been keeping track of our fundraising and we're not that far behind where we need to be for our first goal of the year. A donation of $5, $10, or whatever you're able to spare before the deadline on Thursday should do the trick.

Now, here's the part where I ask for your help:

**Will you add a contribution of whatever you can afford to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota before our first fundraising deadline? I need your support to keep our team on track and focused on all the critical work we have ahead of us. Donate now.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200112-mm4?refcode=em200112-mm4&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---

clean_body: I am about to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our very first fundraising push of the year. Will you let me explain? | "" Friend -- In just a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our very first fundraising push of the year. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important. The truth is, we are behind on our grassroots fundraising target for 2020 and we're only a few days in. January is pretty terrible for this sort of thing -- especially with folks just getting back into the swing of things and fully tuning back in after a much-needed holiday break. With so much going on in Washington, I need to stay focused on fighting for our progressive values in the Senate and making sure Democrats don't lose this seat (and with it, virtually any chance to flip the majority). But trying to keep Minnesota blue and doing my job to protect our health care, defend reproductive freedom, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more has left me with very little time to worry about anything else. The good news is that my team has been keeping track of our fundraising and we're not that far behind where we need to be for our first goal of the year. A donation of $5, $10, or whatever you're able to spare before the deadline on Thursday should do the trick. Now, here's the part where I ask for your help: Will you add a contribution of whatever you can afford to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota before our first fundraising deadline? I need your support to keep our team on track and focused on all the critical work we have ahead of us. Donate now. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" Your support makes an incredible difference for our campaign and my work for the people of Minnesota. I'm very fortunate to have supporters like you in my corner, and I'm so grateful you are a part of the team. Thanks. -- Tina

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: We shouldn’t have to choose between breaking the bank and taking our child to the pediatrician. It’s time for something to change, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
Join our fight for affordable and accessible healthcare for all the children in our district
Peter,
Texas has the highest rate of uninsured children in the country, and for the past three years that number has been rising.
**[As your Congresswoman, I will fight to make sure every single child in Texas has access to healthcare, because they should not be left behind any longer. Pitch in to our movement. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13864635/144638220/1785235803?refcode=113_mm2&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDQ0MzkzMS0yZjM2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gfEHBHHqUaoiSZGYuN_a4P8YoThnLdB5MEuNbkzETE0=)**
As a single mother with a teacher’s salary, I know how scary it is to be one unexpected bill away from a financial emergency. This could mean hundreds of dollars just for antibiotics when your child gets strep throat or delaying important treatments or necessary dental work.
**Access to healthcare should not depend on how much money is in your bank account.**
Republicans constantly say that they are the party of family, faith, and life, yet they let more than one in every ten children in Texas go without healthcare coverage because they refused to expand Medicaid. And for what? Partisan points?
**[It’s time to stand up against representatives who don’t care about our children. Chip in $15 or whatever you can afford to help us fight for affordable and accessible healthcare in 2020 and beyond. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13864637/144638222/1785235803?refcode=113_mm2_link2&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDQ0MzkzMS0yZjM2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gfEHBHHqUaoiSZGYuN_a4P8YoThnLdB5MEuNbkzETE0=)**

body:
https://secure.winred.com/marshall/bob-dole-endorses-doc?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2020jan13hfdoleendoresement
I’m proud to endorse my Congressman, Dr. Roger Marshall, for the U.S. Senate.

Dr. Marshall is a true friend to me and a true friend to Kansas.

He’s hard working, loyal, and dedicated to preserving common-sense Kansas values in the U.S. Senate. Dr. Marshall has my full trust, and I know he will represent our state well.

If you haven’t already, will you join me in supporting him by donating whatever you can afford? (https://secure.winred.com/marshall/bob-dole-endorses-doc?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2020jan13hfdoleendoresement)
DONATE NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/marshall/bob-dole-endorses-doc?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2020jan13hfdoleendoresement)
Thank you,

Senator Bob Dole

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Be the First to Hear My Commercial
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

Since he first came down the escalator to announce his campaign, President Trump has been under constant attack. The radical left has shown they will do and say anything to stop our President and his conservative agenda.

I know what the President is up against because they tried to do the same to me. Today, I will be launching my first radio ad highlighting my record as a battle-tested patriot who, like President Trump, has successfully fought back against false liberal attacks.

I want you to [hear it first!](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=304dcb3a5c&e=9f843ba602)

Just as he did to President Trump, corrupt former New York Attorney General Eric Schneiderman launched politically-motivated attacks against me.

Those attacks were quickly laughed out of court by a Democrat judge. Meanwhile, Eric Schneiderman resigned in disgrace after his history of abusive behavior towards women was exposed.

President Trump is a fighter, and so am I. We've both been attacked by crooked politicians because of our conservative values, but we won't back down.

Facing [baseless attacks](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=5c9795ece1&e=9f843ba602) and this sham impeachment, President Trump needs allies in Washington who aren't afraid of a fight.

I have a proven record as a fighter - on the battle-field, in my community, and in Albany. Now, I want to go to Washington to stand by our President's side as we fight against Nancy Pelosi and her radical allies in Congress.

If you're with me, please take a moment to listen and share our first ad ([https://www.orttforcongress.com/radio-ad](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=2a2e157d8c&e=9f843ba602)), and visit [www.robortt.com](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=5a2e18e2be&e=9f843ba602).

It's time we had some battle-tested, conservative leadership in Washington.

Thank you and God Bless.
Rob

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: The only thing Mitch McConnell cares about:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902d6/55b66746/2d9745e4/80f9fe1/769931844/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | **Mitch McConnell is leading a broken Senate. Every day he's in charge, he makes the damage worse.** The Senate has become a place where good ideas go to die. Gun safety, election security, campaign finance reform, protections for LGBTQIA+ rights, the Violence Against Women Act, raising the minimum wage, and any meaningful effort to tackle our climate crisis. Rather than passing legislation to actually help people, they are spending their days packing the courts with right-wing judges. Making it harder for Americans to get health care. And plotting to rig the impeachment process to protect President Trump. This falls completely on Mitch McConnell's shoulders. It's what he wants. **Mitch McConnell is only interested in protecting his own power, even at the expense of the American people and our Democracy. I refuse to let that continue. We must stand up to him.** **[We must fight. Contribute $3 so we can win this Senate race and take on Mitch McConnell in the Senate.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902d6/55b66746/2d9745e4/80f9fe2/769931844/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-13-mitch&recurring=1&amount=3")** We will fight to get dark money out of our elections. We will fight to abolish the outdated and unjust Electoral College. We will fight to secure our elections from hostile foreign powers and expand voting rights. We will stay laser-focused on the structural inequities that keep McConnell in power while regular Americans are locked out, let down, and left behind. **_And we will take our case directly to the American people, who want a Senate that works for them, not for Mitch McConnell._** **But before we are able to take him on, we have to win in Massachusetts.** **[So I'm asking you to make a $3 contribution to help fuel our campaign- so we can win, and then take on Mitch McConnell together.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902d6/55b66746/2d9745e4/80f9fe2/769931844/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-13-mitch&recurring=1&amount=3")** _Joe_ [contribute](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902d6/55b66746/2d9745e4/80f9fe2/769931844/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-13-mitch&recurring=1&amount=3") |
---|---|---

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4392/4bd7760e/46d32181/77acf62b/3382889583/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_30OP_200113_1_1&source=314_EM_PT_30OP_200113_1_1")** to make a donation.

Friend,

There is not doubt about it: 2020 is going to be a year for the record books.

When the history of 2020 is written, **it is paramount** that this year be remembered as the year when the American people made it clear that socialism and the far left have no place serving at the highest levels of our government.

**It is paramount** that 2020 be remembered as the year when Americans re-affirmed our commitment to the Constitution, to capitalism and the free market, to individual liberty.

[** Donate $25 →**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=ee490e1142f94c559a0952a43bb8d757&_e=bd-wdSZBEFrN3VKXBOYECPKPiY-NzfTvulzeq7vE4GKL_8DL_ZQTUg3sFuYDh27cwXT9UYHBvA-8AUXs1j2isFi0AD9bYrW484Dhi3i9WGV_V8B5lCy0q3_heN665FXqDYMDQGK8505FV7RkksChBkjsftT_VNMZqx7U8j3PGGWJV6Wc9tg6KPN_OXSibz_FV6g9HzPsiQiys3cyYuhVXmKZ63jBgpWfSUP73r1Ss0v471zLMt4OeVIq3-HtY9mkpdqVDuHCTbxN17xtXSHTuXv3KRQjyzXQf9_Wrra5tBR6ZggcTdlt4tM8VGWMPQ0igpcDDAj_AaglvbW0V2UfCw%3D%3D)
---

**It is paramount** that 2020 be remembered as the year that the Republican party embraced multifaceted diversity and invested in defending our country AGAIN – and re-invested in the success of our military – ensuring it remained the world’s greatest!

**2020 must be remembered as the year of Republican women.**

name: Update (via NRCC)
subject: Action needed from Trump supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Membership renewal is needed ASAP to defend President Trump and House Conservatives from the Left's vicious attacks and their baseless impeachment plot.
**

subject: Trump's newest lie about Nancy Pelosi

body:
|

| | Peter, seriously? The audacity he has to claim Nancy Pelosi is the least successful Speaker of the House in history is laughable, especially since his one legislative "accomplishment" in three years is passing the 2017 tax bill that is hailed as a widespread failure for the American people. He needs to hear from average Americans that he's wrong \-- Pelosi isn't the failure. He is: [**Tell Trump: He 'll be lucky to be remembered as the least successful president in U.S. history>>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfc3/6e9863e8/17d9526b/1db040a9/1618603688/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/lq_N8PV7") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. name: Cory Booker
subject: I've made the hard decision to suspend my campaign for president.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| It's with a full heart that I share this news. Friend, Nearly one year ago, I got in the race for president because I believed to my core that the answer to the common pain Americans are feeling right now, the answer to Donald Trump's hatred and division, is to reignite our spirit of common purpose to take on our biggest challenges and build a more just and fair country for everyone. I've always believed that. I still believe that. I'm proud I never compromised my faith in these principles during this campaign to score political points or tear down others. And maybe I'm stubborn, but I'll never abandon my faith in what we can accomplish when we join together. **I will carry this fight forward -- I just won 't be doing it as a candidate for president this year.** **Friend, it 's with a full heart that I share this news -- I've made the decision to suspend my campaign for president.** [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fdb/5fca0d19/7a983a30/291d3f18/1680912219/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VP6mNrhIBs8&feature=youtu.be") It was a difficult decision to make, but I got in this race to win, and I've always said I wouldn't continue if there was no longer a path to victory. Our campaign has reached the point where we need more money to scale up and continue building a campaign that can win -- money we don't have, and money that is harder to raise because I won't be on the next debate stage and because the urgent business of impeachment will rightly be keeping me in Washington. So I've chosen to suspend my campaign now, take care of my wonderful staff, and give you time to consider the other strong choices in the field. I'm proud of the ideas we brought to this Democratic primary and, more importantly, the values we championed throughout -- that the only way we make progress is by bringing people together -- even when we were told that our approach couldn't win. Because our values must always be our values, even when that's not convenient. **Over the past eleven months of this campaign, we rallied around bold ideas to tackle some of the biggest challenges we face as a nation.** We moved the debate forward on gun violence -- introducing a plan with the most aggressive gun safety measures our country had ever seen. We advocated for progressive, swift change to our criminal justice reform system. We fought to protect and strengthen reproductive rights and access to abortion. Together, we spoke out and stood up for people and communities that have been left out and left behind. We never backed down from our commitment to being a campaign powered by the people. I'm so grateful to the supporters who invested time, money, and resources into building this organization. I'm forever indebted to you and your activism. I will be doing everything in my power to elect the eventual Democratic nominee for president, whomever that may be, and to elect great Democrats to the Senate and up and down the ballot. 2020 is the most important election of our lifetimes -- we have to beat Donald Trump... but beating Trump is the floor, not the ceiling. We must remember that throughout the campaign to come, and as we work to build a more just America in Trump's wake. It's activists like you who are going to be so important in this election and I feel so lucky to have you on my team. **We may have not reached our ultimate goal, but over the last year I 've had the pleasure of meeting so many incredible, inspiring, engaged people all over this country, and I am more confident now than ever that _together we will rise._** Cory
---

body:
Day One was just the start. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=2b2b4fdf06&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | Friend \-- Wow. Not only did you show up for Mike to make Day One a success, you blew it out of the park. Our team held nearly 150 events in 26 states, ranging from opening a brand new campaign headquarters in Chicago to a community dog walk in Los Alamitos, California. We had mayors who endorsed Mike out in their communities, and Judge Judy Sheindlin in Texas with Mike. We held events with African American community leaders in Atlanta, veterans in North Carolina, and a drag brunch in Columbus, Ohio in support of our campaign. Our supporters even traveled to be a part of Day One, like a couple who drove two and a half hours just to attend our first Massachusetts for Mike event in their state.
---
| [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=697ea56c77&e=f54746ec54)
---

---
| But Saturday was just Day One of our nationwide campaign. We will have folks on the ground talking to voters **every single day** from now to November 3, 2020. Day One proved our team can and WILL defeat Donald Trump in November. [**Help us keep this momentum going all across the country. Learn more about how to get involved today!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=ef7c170bff&e=f54746ec54) Thanks again for your support, this weekend and every day. We couldn't do this without you. Dan Kanninen
States Director

name: Claire Chase
subject: Help Me Qualify For The Primary Ballot!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
I cannot believe it has only been a few months since I started this journey to turn New Mexico's 2nd District RED. In that time I've met so many voters who recognize the importance of electing a political outsider as our nominee to make sure we win back this seat in November.
---
| | | [Stop the Democrats!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013frEbatgJEfZLhGLhr0OQ0dBwq1Hz0QmW8JnXb9nkosViVVfVmxB1eJsFTm7iszhz7hYoq4A8zHe88vOtY54S-cAJXCZcJ1dj0V3gnuIma_K-slbAdC-xJABtW6BO9kYCF9KOPN7CD9ZfDZkS6lsdA==&c=O_rIoHHws8O3IoXSfnXYVmR7WuRv8rIVAq0AQl98Mk74YFxSlUxnsA==&ch=8yFJ-XaHqbM6TKMmTbhTWypfnb__gj4CfJ1nnDSWI9yo-QGUG1W3Ag==)
---
| The next step in our journey is to qualify for the primary ballot. I need to gather 1,260 signatures from registered Republicans in order to qualify to be on the ballot in June and I need your help to do it.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, I cannot believe it has only been a few months since I started this journey to turn New Mexico's 2nd District RED. In that time I've met so many voters who recognize the importance of electing a political outsider as our nominee to make sure we win back this seat in November. | | | == | The next step in our journey is to qualify for the primary ballot. I need to gather 1,260 signatures from registered Republicans in order to qualify to be on the ballot in June and I need your help to do it. | | | == | == to download the petition form. All you need to do is fill it out and send it back to my campaign before January 22nd. You can even hand it to me if I run into you on the campaign trail. If you have questions please email mailto:eron@clairechase.com. I know with your help we'll make it on the ballot this June and show the Liberals that we are taking our state back! Thank You! | | == == == | | | PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC. | | Claire Chase for Congress | PO Box 8010, Roswell, NM 88202 | | Sent by mailto:info@clairechase.org

name: James Carville
subject: McConnell DONE
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | [**CALLING ALL DEMOCRATS!**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200113_em_fr_b1_carville_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") Nancy Pelosi asked ya. Adam Schiff asked ya. Kirsten Gillibrand asked ya. Khizr Khan asked ya. Tom Udall asked ya. Martin Heinrich asked ya. Paul Begala asked ya. Deb Haaland asked ya. Now I'm asking ya again. [_**Every top Democrat under the sun asked because hitting Ben Ray 's goal is MAKE OR BREAK to defeat McConnell's Senate! Peter,

Did you see what Steve King did last week?

In case you missed it, he went on the House floor to give a 30-minute speech about how he’s been mistreated since he was kicked off all of his committee assignments for spewing white nationalist hatred.

**Enough is enough. It’s time for a new representative for IA-04, a congressman who will stand with everyone.**

**[Pitch in $5 or more to J.D. Scholten RIGHT NOW so we can defeat hatred and stand up for love, decency, and respect.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13872896/144719641/-52674191?refcode=em20_200113_SteveKingRR-NO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDRhMjkzZC01MjM2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2B8mvS4vUUL81rV49B0hYfCSj5cKx3bPcmVfZ9DFbu4=)**

\- Team Scholten \---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Peter --

Moments ago, Steve King gave a speech on the floor of the House of Representatives. Instead of advocating for his constituents here in Iowa, he spent 30 minutes insisting that white nationalism isn’t real and making up conspiracy theories about the Democratic Party.

White nationalism is very real and has been used to fuel mass murders across this country. Mother Emanuel AME Church, Charlottesville, Tree of Life Synagogue, El Paso, and many, many more.

And let's not forget, Steve King himself once said "White nationalist, white supremacist ... how did that language become offensive?"

**[Enough is enough. Let’s kick this guy out of office and get a real representative for Iowa’s 4th in Congress. Chip in to elect J.D. today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13872897/144719642/-52674191?refcode=em20_200113_SteveKingRR-NO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDRhMjkzZC01MjM2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2B8mvS4vUUL81rV49B0hYfCSj5cKx3bPcmVfZ9DFbu4=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13872899/144719643/-52674191?refcode=em20_200113_SteveKingRR-NO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDRhMjkzZC01MjM2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2B8mvS4vUUL81rV49B0hYfCSj5cKx3bPcmVfZ9DFbu4=)
---

Our district needs a representative who will stand with us in Congress on important issues from improving healthcare to helping our farmers. Instead, we have Steve King, insisting he’s being treated “like a federal felon” since he’s been sidelined by his own party for his racist remarks. Time and again, he puts his own selfish agenda above the needs of the 4th district.

clean_body: | = Peter, Did you see what Steve King did last week? In case you missed it, he went on the House floor to give a 30-minute speech about how he’s been mistreated since he was kicked off all of his committee assignments for spewing white nationalist hatred. Enough is enough. It’s time for a new representative for IA-04, a congressman who will stand with everyone. = \- Team Scholten \--------------------------------------------------------------------------- Peter -- Moments ago, Steve King gave a speech on the floor of the House of Representatives. Instead of advocating for his constituents here in Iowa, he spent 30 minutes insisting that white nationalism isn’t real and making up conspiracy theories about the Democratic Party. White nationalism is very real and has been used to fuel mass murders across this country. Mother Emanuel AME Church, Charlottesville, Tree of Life Synagogue, El Paso, and many, many more. And let's not forget, Steve King himself once said "White nationalist, white supremacist ... how did that language become offensive?" = = Our district needs a representative who will stand with us in Congress on important issues from improving healthcare to helping our farmers. Instead, we have Steve King, insisting he’s being treated “like a federal felon” since he’s been sidelined by his own party for his racist remarks. Time and again, he puts his own selfish agenda above the needs of the 4th district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = White nationalism is real, and dangerous. We have to stand strong against this hate. That’s why this election is so important. Thanks for helping us make sure J.D. can stand tall for all. \-- Team Scholten =

subject: Trump's Average Unemployment Rate is the Lowest in Recorded History
body:
"President Trump starts off 2020 having presided over a lower average unemployment rate than any president..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e024ed6afa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump's Average Unemployment Rate is the Lowest in Recorded History**

“President Trump starts off 2020 having presided over a lower average unemployment rate than any president at a comparable point in office in recorded history,” Philip Klein reports in the _Washington Examiner. _

“Since February 2017, Trump's first full month in office, the monthly unemployment rate has averaged 3.9%. No prior president has averaged less than 4% over the first 35 months of his presidency. The closest was Dwight Eisenhower.” The unemployment rate for December held steady at a historically low 3.5%, according to Friday’s jobs report.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ddb7f9d17&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration on Friday marked the 100th mile of wall construction along the southern border”—the first part of many more miles to come, Acting Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf says. “Officials have said that there is no comparison between the old Vietnam-era landing mats and the new 30-foot structures—complete with cameras, access roads, lights and other tech,” Adam Shaw reports for [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54bb295533&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxnews.com/politics/trump-administration-marks-100-miles-of-border-wall-promises-many-more-to-come").
---
|
---
| “Naturally, the Obama alums were in perfect sync with the dominant media narrative in the four days between the Soleimani strike and Iran’s feeble retaliation. They helped feed the breathless headlines and feverish speculation that the coming conflagration would rattle the world . . . Instead, they all had egg on their faces for getting the big story wrong. Again,” Michael Goodwin writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f51f8a655&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump's tweet in Farsi supporting Iranians who are protesting Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has earned more than 350,000 likes, making it the “most liked Persian tweet” ever, Carlin Becker reports for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0ba7f33a1&e=3ee4985eea) _. _
---
|

name: EPA ALERT
subject: Environmental Protection Agency bill of rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| **_Embattled EPA Workers Say They Need 'Bill Of Rights' Under Trump Administration_** [Click here to add your name to tell Congress to pass an EPA workers bill of rights.](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/jan-epa-bill-of-rights?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+add+your+name+to+tell+Cong&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2")
* * *
This is unheard of. Employees of the Environmental Protection Agency are so afraid that the Trump administration will ignore scientific evidence, that they're asking for their own bill of rights.

**Here 's what they're asking for:** _" A right to protect human health and the environment, to protect environmental justice communities, and to work without fear of reprisal."_ [Will you add your name and tell Congress to pass an EPA workers bill of rights?](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/jan-epa-bill-of-rights?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+add+your+name+and+tell+Congress&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2") | | [SIGN ON](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/jan-epa-bill-of-rights?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2")
---
The EPA helps ensure you have access to clean water to drink, safe air to breathe, and a planet that is healthy. But the Trump administration's close ties to the oil industry and big polluters mean that they'll willfully ignore your safety.

[EPA employees are trying to fight back, but they need our help. Sign on now to demand that Congress act.](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/jan-epa-bill-of-rights?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+EPA+employees+are+trying+to+fight+back+b&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2")

Thank you,

314 Team

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4390/4bd7760e/46ce4dce/77acf657/3237528061/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200112_1_2")** to make a donation.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can ""** to make a donation.

body:

---
| **More Options:
_Congress of Counties Later This Month!_**
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Congress of Counties is approaching quickly. At the end of this month, Hoosier Republicans from across the state will come together for the ultimate event to prepare for the 2020 election, with breakout sessions on important campaign topics, food, receptions, and more.

**This two-day training event takes place Friday, January 31 and Saturday, February 1...and we're excited to see you there!**
**[\--> Register Now <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=34bad6b1db&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
Can't make it both days? We understand your busy schedule and we're now offering [a special registration opportunity](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=285352771d&e=1acd9bb3d6) that will allow you to save money and still attend some of Congress of Counties!

Here are some of the [discounted sessions](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=276c67e91d&e=1acd9bb3d6) now available:
* **Friday Night Party -- $50**
Come join your Indiana Republican Party for a big bash on the Friday evening of Congress of Counties! We'll have appetizers, drinks, live entertainment and opportunities to meet Governor Eric Holcomb and Chairman Kyle Hupfer.

* **Saturday Lunch -- $30**
Can't make it Friday night? On the Saturday afternoon of Congress of Counties, we'll host a lunch that will feature Governor Eric Holcomb as we head into his 2020 reelection campaign.

* **Friday Night Party & Saturday Lunch -- $75**
Attend just the Friday night party and the Saturday lunch (without attending the breakout sessions) for one low price!

* **Congress of Counties General Registration -- $100**
Attend ALL Congress of Counties events – including breakout sessions, the Friday night party, lunch, and MORE -- all included in one price!

[Full general admission registration](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ad6ae3664a&e=1acd9bb3d6) still remains open for the **full two-day training conference**. Full registration includes the Friday night party and the Saturday lunch, as well as all of the breakout sessions -- [c](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9a21f06fd8&e=1acd9bb3d6)[heck out the full schedule here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5b5fcdbb18&e=1acd9bb3d6).

**Spots are filling up quickly** \-- [sign up now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ced63e05e7&e=1acd9bb3d6) to secure your spot for this exciting event, gear-up to the 2020 election, and hear directly from Governor Holcomb!

Thanks!
-Indiana Republican Party

Our January fundraising numbers are going to be one of our last opportunities to demonstrate the strength of our grassroots movement before the Iowa caucuses.

With the support of this team, we've had a strong start to the month, but with the caucuses just around the corner, and the latest poll showing it's an extremely close race, we can't slow down now.

**We don't have a day to spare to fall behind. We're about halfway through the month right now, and we need a strong response to this email in order to stay on track to hitting our January fundraising goal -- which means raising $750,000 in the next 3 days.**

**[Can you chip in $2 or whatever you can for the first time to help hit this goal and make this our strongest fundraising month yet?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb3e/45c30650/1ecf5d3a3/66ff3450/1176566974/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjQ2Rl9NTUdfTEFVX1FfMjAyMDAxMTNfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN46F_MMG_LAU_Q_20200113_V1S1_P")**

Every single day this month, our organizing team and grassroots volunteers across the country are working their hearts out to grow our movement for big, structural change.

They're knocking on doors in the chilly snow, making phone calls and sending text messages to voters, and hosting events to talk with their friends and neighbors about how they can get involved.

**This critical work takes real resources and hitting this mid-month goal is the only way we can keep building our momentum and win in Iowa.**

**[You can truly feel the Team Warren energy everywhere you turn -- and it's all possible because of grassroots donors. body:
While Sen. Cornyn is relying heavily on his corporate PAC allies, we're doing things differently.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890768/7f51f7bc/4af0125c/4ef01162/3397200316/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| |
| [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890768/7f51f7bc/4af0125c/4ef01161/3397200316/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200113.1nd__748__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Urgent, Peter:

It won't be long until we learn exactly how much money McConnell's henchman Sen. John Cornyn raised last quarter, and fair warning: it will probably be a HUGE number!

But we're doing things differently on Team MJ. Instead of relying on big corporate PACs, **we 're building a huge team of grassroots supporters (25,000 and counting!)

[Will you donate before Wednesday's deadline to become an Official 2020 Member of Team MJ? Your gift will go directly toward helping us build the campaign we need to DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn and we'll send you a link to your printable official Team MJ membership card!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890768/7f51f7bc/4af0125c/4ef01161/3397200316/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200113.1nd__748__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

So far, **MJ has traveled more than 11,000 miles and spoken with thousands of Texans** about the issues on their minds -- all thanks to grassroots supporters like you. From health care to climate change to gun violence, the message MJ is hearing is clear: Texans are ready for change.

But to make that change happen, we need to win this election, and campaigning in Texas isn't cheap! With more than 15 million registered voters in Texas **and 20 media markets** , it's going to take a lot of resources to spread MJ's message. And with **only 36 days until the start of early voting** , we're running out of time!

**Your grassroots donation will help fuel MJ 's time on the road, talk with more Texans, and spread her message all over the state with TV and digital ads. Will you help MJ bring change to the Senate by becoming an Official 2020 Member today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

Cornyn is relying heavily on his corporate PAC allies, we're doing things differently. | "" | | | "" Urgent, Peter: It won't be long until we learn exactly how much money McConnell's henchman Sen. John Cornyn raised last quarter, and fair warning: it will probably be a HUGE number! But we're doing things differently on Team MJ. Instead of relying on big corporate PACs, we 're building a huge team of grassroots supporters (25,000 and counting!) "" So far, MJ has traveled more than 11,000 miles and spoken with thousands of Texans about the issues on their minds -- all thanks to grassroots supporters like you. From health care to climate change to gun violence, the message MJ is hearing is clear: Texans are ready for change. But to make that change happen, we need to win this election, and campaigning in Texas isn't cheap! With more than 15 million registered voters in Texas and 20 media markets , it's going to take a lot of resources to spread MJ's message. And with only 36 days until the start of early voting , we're running out of time! Your grassroots donation will help fuel MJ 's time on the road, talk with more Texans, and spread her message all over the state with TV and digital ads. Will you help MJ bring change to the Senate by becoming an Official 2020 Member today? name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Women's rights are already threatened in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Republicans have lost no time in attacking women's rights in the new year. 205 GOP members of Congress submitted a letter to the Supreme Court asking them to undo _Roe v. Wade_ and destroy the right to choose and bodily autonomy. In March, the Court will be hearing the Louisiana abortion case that this amicus curae brief references \-- meaning they could undo Roe v. Wade and legal abortion in the U.S. before the 2020 election. The Supreme Court, led by Trump's hand-picked, anti-choice justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, has already been taking steps toward dismantling these rights, rejecting a challenge to a Kentucky law requiring doctors to perform ultrasounds and play a fetal heartbeat to those seeking abortions. name: Debi Bryant
subject: A Golden Opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Let's Seize It!
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13876219/144760133/-1907457918?refcode=01102020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDgxYjdhYy02NTM2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_V3uwsGzDMlCff3OmYKdCdjGAiSn9m0EO3UuN3k8uU=)
---
Dear Friend, After the first rounds of candidate forums I can say, with full confidence and with all due respect to his opponents, that Rick is by far the best candidate to take on the eventual Republican nominee. His life experience as a dad and an engineer give him the motivation and skill set to be effective in Congress. His positions, while rooted in our Democratic values, are moderate and won't scare off the Republican-leaning independent voters we need to vote for us in a district Trump carried by 17 points. He's got the rhetorical chops to take on Pete Sessions, or whoever emerges as the Republican nominee. And, he's been crisscrossing Central Texas for two and a half years, building the relationships, the volunteer network, and the name recognition necessary to win. And no matter how hard you work, you can't cram two and a half years of the lessons-learned that come with running an end to end Congressional campaign into two and a half short months. Friend, Flores' retirement has given us a golden, perhaps once-in-a-decade opportunity to take this seat. But it takes more than a good candidate. We need you and thousands like you to support the campaign so we have the resources to make it happen. Let's seize this opportunity while we've got it. [Click here to pitch in what you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13876220/144760134/1282640063?refcode=011320_emline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDgxYjdhYy02NTM2LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_V3uwsGzDMlCff3OmYKdCdjGAiSn9m0EO3UuN3k8uU=) so we have the resources to spread the word. clean_body: Let's Seize It! | = Dear Friend, After the first rounds of candidate forums I can say, with full confidence and with all due respect to his opponents, that Rick is by far the best candidate to take on the eventual Republican nominee. His life experience as a dad and an engineer give him the motivation and skill set to be effective in Congress. His positions, while rooted in our Democratic values, are moderate and won't scare off the Republican-leaning independent voters we need to vote for us in a district Trump carried by 17 points. He's got the rhetorical chops to take on Pete Sessions, or whoever emerges as the Republican nominee. And, he's been crisscrossing Central Texas for two and a half years, building the relationships, the volunteer network, and the name recognition necessary to win. And no matter how hard you work, you can't cram two and a half years of the lessons-learned that come with running an end to end Congressional campaign into two and a half short months. Friend, Flores' retirement has given us a golden, perhaps once-in-a-decade opportunity to take this seat. But it takes more than a good candidate. We need you and thousands like you to support the campaign so we have the resources to make it happen. Let's seize this opportunity while we've got it. = so we have the resources to spread the word. And please forward this email to someone who needs to know about Rick and his campaign! If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you! name: Sara 2020
subject: If you missed Rachel Maddow's show on Friday night, here's what she said about Susan Collins →
body:
We're done waiting for Susan Collins to do the right thing.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e7e/4bef7a87/6acc9f4b/287f8500/2910706245/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Last week, Susan Collins gave Mitch McConnell the green light to move forward without witness testimony in the impeachment trial. Now, she's trying to have it both ways. Here's what Rachel Maddow has to say about that:
"A lot of people have turned blue and hurt themselves holding their breath waiting for Susan Collins to do something interesting in principle when she has raised the prospect that she might do so. She raises that prospect a lot, she very rarely actually does so."
\- Rachel Maddow
**She 's right - we're done waiting for Susan Collins to do the right thing. We're done listening to her say she is "disappointed" and then falling in line behind McConnell and Trump. **
If you're ready to elect a Senator we can count on:
[**Make a $3 contribution now and we will elect Sara Gideon to the U.S. Senate and defeat Susan Collins.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e7e/4bef7a87/6acc9f4b/287f8507/2910706245/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200113-full")
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e7e/4bef7a87/6acc9f4b/287f8507/2910706245/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200113-full")******
Thanks for your fight,
Team Sara
[**P.S. - If you missed it, watch the clip here!**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e7e/4bef7a87/6acc9f4b/287f8506/2910706245/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://twitter.com/SaraGideon/status/1216781664824721409")

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Tell Democrats: America First!
body:
Some truly amazing things are happening in our nation right now, good and bad.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-360315-842701-4817881-c8e386e0d1-493f4f359a)
Patriot,

Happy Monday!

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-360315-842701-4817880-f13eb6d1af-493f4f359a) Some truly amazing things are happening in our nation right now, good and bad.

First, I want to thank President Trump for his leadership on Iran. His message in Farsi to Iran to not kill Iranian protesters was a masterclass in diplomacy.

But as much as President Trump does with his America First policies, he’s counteracted by the weakness of Democrats who INVITE terrorism . . . and the plan of the Democrats is working.

On Friday, an Iranian national was arrested with deadly weapons and $22,000 in cash just miles from Mar-a-Lago.

On Saturday, a man posed as a member of President Trump’s security team, getting through two checkpoints before he was apprehended at Palm Beach International Airport.

This comes after an Iranian politician posted a link to properties owned by the Trump family along with an order to “stand up against the whole world” and an Iranian cleric placed an $80 million bounty on our President’s head.

Rather than bolster security at airports and condemn the threats and actions from Iran, Democrats, including my opponent Lois Frankel, voted to protect the terrorist regime.

While President Trump continues in his pledge to place America First, Democrats further their “America Last” agenda.

Help me get rid of one of those “America Last” Democrats [**by donating today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-360315-842701-4817880-f13eb6d1af-493f4f359a).

When it comes to National Security, there’s no equivocation, there’s no playing politics. American lives and American interests come first. There’s no debate.

[**Please donate today to send a message to Democrats that “America Comes First!”**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-360315-842701-4817880-f13eb6d1af-493f4f359a)

[**After you donate**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-360315-842701-4817880-f13eb6d1af-493f4f359a), you’ll be asked to click on a link to send a tweet to Democrat leaders and President Trump to show them what we stand for!

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: James Mackler
subject: Our race is about to heat up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
I'm not taking a penny from corporate PACs
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e4/18d6a294/4cde9e51/26d63796/5068285/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Team: If history is any indication -- and I'm willing to bet it is -- our race is about to heat up. [_**Chip in now to flip the Senate ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e4/18d6a294/4cde9e51/26d63797/5068285/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDAxMTMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200113?refcode=jme200113_m&recurring=true") In 2018, the Tennessee Senate race cost MILLIONS of dollars. The Republican candidate received huge infusions of cash from Washington Republicans and GOP groups plus the support of President Trump on the campaign trail. **Now, it 's 2020, and there are TWO Republican candidates in our race. One of them is a wealthy self-funder and the other has deep ties to Trump and the Washington Republican establishment.** I don't have all of that. I'm a combat veteran who isn't taking a dollar from corporate PACs. I know -- it probably sounds like an uphill battle, and truth be told, it will be. But I've always faced challenges head-on, and I'm in this race because Tennesseans need a leader who will stand up for what's right. **A lot of eyes are going to be a race and a lot of money is going to be spent. I 'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to chip in whatever they can to compete with the big checks being cut for my opponents.** [_**Will you make a contribution to our campaign today?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e4/18d6a294/4cde9e51/26d63797/5068285/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDAxMTMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200113?refcode=jme200113_m&recurring=true") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1e4/18d6a294/4cde9e51/26d63794/5068285/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDAxMTMiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200113?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200113_m_&refcode2=107423")

name: Democratic Polling Center
subject: re: climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |

Team - 2020 will be a pivotal year in the fight against climate change.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: What happened exactly one hundred years ago today in Oregon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fcf3/6cd27893/53752279/1587faf1/1126888965/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | It was a hard-fought victory: **One hundred years ago to this day, Oregon became the 25th state to ratify the Nineteenth Amendment, giving women the right to vote.** (Of course, Oregonians were ahead of the curve, giving women the right to vote in state elections in 1912.) **This is our history, but it's also the present: even today, equal access to voting is under fierce attack.** If the arc of history bends towards justice, it's because _we_ are the ones bending it. In 2020, we have a chance to bend the arc of history toward justice once again. **[That's why I'm asking for your support on this historic day: because, for all of our progress, our voting rights are at grave risk of sliding backwards under Donald Trump's watch.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fcf3/6cd27893/53752279/1587faee/1126888965/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-01-13-oregonsuffrage&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** Team Trump and his allies plan to win by undermining the heart of our democracy. Massive voter roll purges. Voter suppression. Voter intimidation. Failing to secure our elections systems. A huge flood of corporate, special-interest money. It's up to _us_ to hold them accountable and bend the arc. **[Chip in $3 today and let's ensure that 2020 is a year where we make history again.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fcf3/6cd27893/53752279/1587faee/1126888965/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA name: Team Hick
subject: Cory Gardner is in trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:

#
There are some things you should know about this race, folks: **FACT:** Major public polls show John Hickenlooper defeating Republican incumbent Cory Gardner and flipping this Senate seat blue -- making this race the best chance Democrats have to take back the Senate this year. **FACT:** Gardner is a rubber stamp for the GOP's agenda, and his approval rating is south of 40% because Coloradans are fed up with his failed leadership and putting Washington Republicans before us. **FACT:** The GOP knows Gardner is in trouble, so they're dumping buckets of cash into this race to try to save him.
