body:
We are launching a petition to Chief Justice Roberts to DISQUALIFY MCCONNELL from participating in the Impeachment Trial.

| BOLD Democrats is dedicated to ending Donald Trump's presidency, taking back the Senate, and electing a wave of diverse Democrats. We're the largest organization working to engage Latino voters -- that's how we'll take down Trump. If you really want to receive only our most urgent emails or unsubscribe, _[click here.](https://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ef013/e60883a/b27b4449/145f1805/4095742342/VEsH/?g=fe-eK98pCaBWa8ei0QBjeLA "https://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails")_
**BREAKING: House Democrats to send articles of impeachment to Senate this week, Senate Trial could start in days** Mitch McConnell is not an impartial juror in the Senate Impeachment Trial. He is coordinating with Donald Trump to protect him at all costs. **_[Demand Supreme Court Justice Roberts Disqualify McConnell from Senate Impeachment Trial >>>](https://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ef013/e60883a/b27b4449/145f180a/4095742342/VEsE/?g=fe-eK98pCaBWa8ei0QBjeLA "https://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Disqualify-Mitch-McConnell?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.01.13_B3_Disqualify-Mitch-McConnell_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")_** | [Add your name ➞](https://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ef013/e60883a/b27b4449/145f180a/4095742342/VEsF/?g=fe-eK98pCaBWa8ei0QBjeLA "https://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Disqualify-Mitch-McConnell?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.01.13_B3_Disqualify-Mitch-McConnell_X__F1_S1_C1__ns_RS")
---
*Petition is closing @ 9 AM on 01/14/2020*
* * *
Donald Trump has been impeached in the House, and his charges will be voted on in the Senate. His trial will be overseen by Chief Justice John Roberts.

It is the duty of US Senators to now serve as impartial jurors as they hear Trump's case. _They are bound by their Senate oath and the Constitution to deliver "impartial justice according to the Constitution and the laws."_

But Mitch McConnell has made it clear that he is not an impartial juror. He is coordinating with Trump and the White House every step of the way.
We are sick of Mitch McConnell disrespecting the Constitution and degrading our democratic institutions.
---
We are launching a petition to Chief Justice Roberts to DISQUALIFY MCCONNELL from participating in the Impeachment Trial.
[We need 1OO,OOO Democrats to sign on in order to make this petition go viral. name: Peter Khalil
subject: Who do you want?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil
body:
| | | | I know who I want...
---
---
**—**
Part of being a leader is doing what is right, even if it isn't popular. I have been in this race for almost a year now, and the most important observation I have made is this: extremism is eroding our political process. Accordingly, I have made a difficult choice that may disappoint some of my most ardent supporters. But it is the right choice.
There is extremism on both sides of the political spectrum. As I've said before, I've been subjected to some of the behaviors that accompany an unflinchingly black-and-white perspective on the world. My parents came to this country to escape the persecution that accompanies religious extremism and I desperately want to avoid a prolonged era of political extremism in this nation I love so dearly.
You've been asking and I've been reflecting on who I would want leading this country. What kind of person to I want as commander-in-chief of our military and leader of our free world?
Well, my answer is simple: I want someone like my wife.
I want a strong woman - and, yes, it's high time we elect a woman to the highest office in the land - a lawyer, activist, mother, and educator who lifts people up and brings them together.
I want someone who understands deeply what the process of governing means and that the answers aren't always black-and-white.
I want someone who is comfortable having a civil give-and-take as we navigate the grey areas and seemingly intractable disagreements.
I want someone who makes decisions with a reverence for our institutions and for the dignity of our centuries-old republic.
I want someone who will govern with diplomacy, and not with a sledgehammer.
I want someone who leads supporters with kindness and grace - _supporters_ , not followers, -bros, or -crats.
I want someone who is brilliant and bold but who is also pragmatic and flexible.
I want someone who does the right thing, even when it isn't popular.
I want someone who listens carefully, acts deliberately, and when she errs - because we all err - takes responsibility gracefully.
I want [Elizabeth Warren](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYN4EndOMQHzH1nOzFHMl0Fsn0R9HIPi5wLzuerQB83P3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3VxjKO9vZnKXAcYskQPkB7hl-2Fq8RIfXDGPwVjaMSYTq43-2FKHRWEaLt39AoI6BHzDU0nL5-2F1y4PJWjdTmpSR1Xl-2FXhgv2dcPpDSLyG6x-2BNR4-2Fystoz1mz4lPI8w7TlsFm8ZtL3dOwKfko-2FvC16ZfHOfKIGXkX47mHe8OhRhYZl340pDq1uIQ6v5Uv-2FlAHFubo-2BhWBG76MWVVBeGyYIxl97t9xRaRL4Ov-2BSoHZKddZLZZkU3QQGZBCOVZsZMZ5k3WCWHHju4P17VF3YvlvmGkDOp3azjYBMfNsS1SVkRell-2BN1U3ZSlQwoad6Nq3OLkbIRdL8Ml9lv0OKVl1ZcRz6Zgw1aU6F4Z9MLJzga3EQkpliHqLmCoP-2B0IN-2FQ2BbORVpzbJKcYuccwkYJEVms1zdwqNREQvuX4-2BiUiIgahLiLkqUJ-2BB-2FFOte5uCQcPRKDO6I8tmN2MZq2st3Zo0PcSnGvgMxk0knyXMiCIKBEJhLJhMdQmd7qFggfun7Dd3PN8F-2FMGwk4U4rNIAig3O5ewWExuQrBQ-3D-3D) to be my next President. I hope you will join me in supporting her.
With gratitude and excitement,
Peter

---
Fuel the Progressive movement in SW Washington and help us get an office by becoming a sustaining donor!
---

Right now, it's important that we connect with as many undecided voters as possible. [**If you've been waiting for the perfect moment to support Elizabeth, now is the time.
Make your first donation today, and when you do, we'll send you a free sticker >> **](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb30/45c30650/1ecef3be7/66ff258f/1037274649/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXZvdGluZy1zdGsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjU2Rl9NTUdfU1RLX1RfMjAyMDAxMTNfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-voting-stk?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN56F_MMG_STK_T_20200113_V1S1_P")
We're just days away from people getting out and making their decision on who they want to support in the Democratic primary -- early voting for some starts this Friday!

Right now, it's important that we connect with as many voters as possible. That critical work, like knocking on doors, making calls, sending texts, buying ads, and hosting community events, takes a lot of money to pull off -- and we're expanding our efforts every single day.

**But even though the pressure is high, Elizabeth still doesn't host closed-door fundraisers for rich donors, or take money from Washington lobbyists, or PACs. She only relies on grassroots donations from supporters like you to power this campaign.**

We set a big goal of $750,000 by Wednesday -- and your first donation today would be a powerful step toward our goal. That's why we're thanking all first-time donors today with a FREE sticker.

[**Can you chip in $2 right now? When you do, we'll send you a free sticker to thank you.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb30/45c30650/1ecef3be7/66ff258f/1037274649/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXZvdGluZy1zdGsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjU2Rl9NTUdfU1RLX1RfMjAyMDAxMTNfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-voting-stk?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN56F_MMG_STK_T_20200113_V1S1_P")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump calls himself an environmental hero while decimating the EPA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump just claimed to be an "environmentalist," citing a book written by one of his own advisors titled "Donald Trump: An Environmental Hero." It would be funny if it weren't so infuriating \-- he's increased oil drilling access in our national parks, stopped states from regulating car emissions, and withdrawn the U.S. from the Paris Climate Accord. Democrats are fighting back, passing environmental protection legislation in the House, including limiting pollutants in our drinking water, reentering the U.S. into the Paris Climate Accord, and reducing diesel emissions in our air. The futures of our climate, our environment, and ourselves are at stake in 2020 \-- we need to know where engaged Democrats stand today: **Do you trust Trump to save our environment?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfc6/6e9863e8/17d49762/1db04313/3315710721/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/nUIOqb_T") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfc6/6e9863e8/17d49762/1db04313/3315710721/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/nUIOqb_T") Thank you for your commitment to the cause. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfc6/6e9863e8/17d49762/1db04312/3315710721/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200113c.ND&refcode2=pLopqPk2If9B191sVT8i")
---

Washington, DC 20003

body:

---
| Peter, Kendra Horn teamed up with Nancy Pelosi and AOC to pass a sham impeachment inquiry and now they’re refusing to send it to the Senate.

It's time to put an end to these games. [**Will you sign our petition to tell Kendra Horn, Pelosi, and AOC that we have had ENOUGH?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=aa2417b773&e=795c6d9796)

Once you sign the petition PLEASE click one of the buttons below to either share, tweet, or forward the petition link to your friends. It'll make all the difference in amplifying your voice and helping make it clear that Oklahomans are fed up.

Thank you for helping us fight Kendra Horn's radicalism. Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b71c83e70c&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

[**P.S. If you support our campaign against Kendra Horn please consider donating just $3 to help power our campaign. **](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=66a94751e9&e=795c6d9796)

name: Peters, Gary
subject: the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court.
| | |
---
I've got nowhere else to turn, friend: My extreme opponent just announced he broke fundraising records thanks to Donald Trump funneling $3.5 MILLION into Michigan to defeat me, buy this seat and expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.

That's why I'm about to ask for your help - but before I do, I'd like to explain why it's so important we defend Michigan's Democratic Senate seat.

If we lose here, Democrats will throw away our only chance of taking back the Senate. **And that means two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington.**

That means he and Donald Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, and you can bet they'll keep trying to dismantle protections for those with preexisting conditions.

I've won tough elections before, and I'm all in to do it again this year. But polling shows me statistically tied with my opponent, and analysts at The Washington Post rank me as one of the most targeted Democratic senators in the country.

**The good news is Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats can flip the Senate,_but only if we first win in Michigan_. **

So with the future of the Senate on the line, in a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing. That's why we've set a goal to have another 1,284 Election-Year Donors chip in before midnight tonight to win in Michigan so we can take back the Senate for Democrats.

I'd appreciate it if you could give now, even just $3, to help us hit this goal and win. Here's the best link to donate - whatever you give will go toward keeping Michigan blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats: **[_https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk233-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

Thank you,

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da973/5721a3ed/702c7f42/efb50e4/949215185/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. clean_body: Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court. | | | I've got nowhere else to turn, friend: My extreme opponent just announced he broke fundraising records thanks to Donald Trump funneling $3.5 MILLION into Michigan to defeat me, buy this seat and expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate. That's why I'm about to ask for your help - but before I do, I'd like to explain why it's so important we defend Michigan's Democratic Senate seat. If we lose here, Democrats will throw away our only chance of taking back the Senate. And that means two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington. That means he and Donald Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, and you can bet they'll keep trying to dismantle protections for those with preexisting conditions. I've won tough elections before, and I'm all in to do it again this year. But polling shows me statistically tied with my opponent, and analysts at The Washington Post rank me as one of the most targeted Democratic senators in the country. The good news is Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats can flip the Senate,but only if we first win in Michigan. So with the future of the Senate on the line, in a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing. That's why we've set a goal to have another 1,284 Election-Year Donors chip in before midnight tonight to win in Michigan so we can take back the Senate for Democrats. I'd appreciate it if you could give now, even just $3, to help us hit this goal and win. Here's the best link to donate - whatever you give will go toward keeping Michigan blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats: "" Thank you, Gary | "" PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan Po Box 32072 Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. body:
The right to choose is on the line.
|
---

| | More than 200 members of Congress asked the Supreme Court to consider overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , effectively upending women's constitutional right to choose. Nearly all of them are Republicans and are men. **This is just one of the reasons why we need to elect more women to Congress, and it 's just one of the reasons why I'm running for office.** I promise to always fight for women's equality and to safeguard women's rights and reproductive freedom. Cornyn and we'll send you a link to your printable official Team MJ membership card!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890776/7f51f7bc/4af2bc3a/4ef012ba/3450990045/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200113.2nd__750__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

> So far, **MJ has traveled more than 11,000 miles and spoken with thousands of Texans** about the issues on their minds -- all thanks to grassroots supporters like you. From health care to climate change to gun violence, the message MJ is hearing is clear: Texans are ready for change.

With more than 15 million registered voters in Texas **and 20 media markets** , it's going to take a lot of resources to spread MJ's message. And with **only 36 days until the start of early voting** , we're running out of time!

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Tell Mr. Trump to send aid to Puerto Rico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
The earthquakes that have struck Puerto Rico this past week are devastating, Friend. My heart goes out to the brave first responders and to all those who have been affected. The people of Puerto Rico deserve urgent attention and support from their government in this time of heightened uncertainty, fear, and grief. clean_body: | | | | The earthquakes that have struck Puerto Rico this past week are devastating, Friend. My heart goes out to the brave first responders and to all those who have been affected. The people of Puerto Rico deserve urgent attention and support from their government in this time of heightened uncertainty, fear, and grief. They cannot afford to suffer the same neglect that followed Hurricane Maria — the president should step up and offer our assistance immediately. I’m calling on the Trump administration and relevant agencies to send aid for Puerto Rico’s recovery — And to help with the relief efforts in Puerto Rico, please consider supporting one of these organizations: * To find more organizations, visit . In solidarity, Tom | | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! body:
We've got to stop Betsy DeVos...
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae8/704929dc/1612ef49/39938ab7/42686319/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzMtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk33-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-devos_petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=davis&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-supporter_survey%3Fcode%3Djtk33-fr-nd")
Here's something that not a lot of folks know about me, friend: My 13-hour filibuster for abortion rights was not my first rodeo.
Two years before that, I led another filibuster to stop $5.4 billion in cuts to our public schools. And that fight was a personal one, too - years earlier, my whole life changed after a coworker handed me a brochure for a local community college.
That's why it makes me sick to my stomach that Betsy Devos - _the person responsible for protecting our students_ - has done nothing but harm them. **If you agree, I 'm asking you to stand with me today by signing my petition right now.**
**[Add your name to demand an education secretary that puts our students first!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-devos_petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=davis&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-supporter_survey%3Fcode%3Djtk33-fr-nd")**
Betsy DeVos has proposed major cuts to public schools - cuts just like the ones I filibustered to stop nearly a decade ago. She was also recently held in contempt of court for refusing to defend students defrauded by shady, for-profit colleges.
I want my granddaughters' generation to have access to a good public education like I did - and all the opportunities that came along with it. But Betsy DeVos has failed them again and again and again. **So if you care about public schools in this country, I 'm counting on you to speak out with me right now and call for Betsy DeVos to go:**
**[Sign the petition to demand an education secretary that puts our students first!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-devos_petition?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=davis&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-supporter_survey%3Fcode%3Djtk33-fr-nd")**
Thank you,
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae8/704929dc/1612ef49/39938aa9/42686319/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae8/704929dc/1612ef49/39938aa8/42686319/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae8/704929dc/1612ef49/39938aab/42686319/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The wall is going up, and illegal immigration is down!
body:
Americans spent years telling Washington to fix our country’s broken immigration system. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8fdf843e37&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 13, 2020
---
| | |
# **The wall is going up, and illegal immigration is down!**

**Americans spent years** telling Washington to fix our country’s broken immigration system. But career politicians ignored the will of voters and pushed “solutions” that left special interests happy and most citizens frustrated.

**Donald J. Trump won** the Presidency promising to end that stalemate. Now, despite shocking levels of resistance from Democrats in Congress, the rule of law is being restored at our nation’s doorstep. Mile by mile, President Trump is keeping his promise.

[Watch: Out with the old, in with the new wall!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=206ab998a3&e=3ee4985eea)

**The 100 th mile** of border wall construction was announced on Friday—a “milestone achievement,” Acting Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf said.

**“New wall** has been constructed in every border state from California to Texas. This is a milestone for our entire country, and this would not have been possible without the President’s steadfast determination and leadership,” Wolf said.

**“Walls work,”** he added. They’re “an undeniable impediment to human smugglers, drug traffickers, and other criminals who have exploited our lack of effective border infrastructure.” The wall comes as part of a much larger strategy by President Trump to curb illegal immigration, including new deals with countries such as Mexico, Guatemala, Honduras, and El Salvador, to protect our asylum system for those who need it most.

**The progress** in the past year alone has been staggering. Last May, monthly border apprehensions skyrocketed to more than 144,000 in the midst of our National Emergency, leaving resources for our law enforcement officers stretched to their limits. Now, illegal immigration is down for the seventh straight month.

**“The President listened** to his operators on the front lines,” Wolf said. As a result, not only was border wall funding secured, but the President made sure our officers have the tools they need to get the problem under control. That means all-weather roads, lighting, enforcement cameras, and other enforcement technology.

**The result?** Since border wall construction began in Tucson, Arizona, illegal crossings are down 24 percent. In San Diego, California, they’re down 27 percent. And in Yuma, Arizona, they are down _over 78 percent._

[“Trump touts court ruling allowing military funds for border wall construction.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3fd987da09&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** **Watch:** [100 miles of border wall—and counting](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=60d99d06fc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: America is WORKING!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bfb2876201&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Friday’s jobs report** builds on what is perhaps the biggest storyline of the Trump Presidency: the blue-collar, working-class economic boom that began 3 years ago.

**The headline numbers** , such as the unemployment rate remaining at a _50-year low of 3.5 percent_ , show how the [U.S. economy is firing on all cylinders](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd63e90b54&e=3ee4985eea). The most powerful takeaway, though, is what the Trump Economy is doing for historically disadvantaged communities:
* Wage growth for workers now outpaces growth for managers.

* Wage growth for those without a bachelor’s degree now outpaces growth for those with a bachelor’s degree or higher.

* Wage growth for the lowest earners now outpaces growth for the highest earners.

**The only ones** shaking their heads today are the “experts” who told us that President Trump’s economy would be a mess. For everyone else, it’s a great time to be on the job.

[_The Wall Street Journal:_ “Manufacturers Increase Perks to Get New Hires to Move”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=248bb0a9fd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da73fe206f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0a98106e2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=cb6a17f136)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: just got out of a meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I just got out of my weekly check-in with our finance team, and I have some bad news to share with you.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200113-mm5?refcode=em200113-mm5&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

I just got out of my weekly check-in with our finance team, and I have some bad news to share with you:

We are less than two weeks into January and not on pace to reach our very first fundraising goal of 2020.

I'm a little worried because our race is a top target for Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their billionaire buddies who will spend whatever it takes to defeat me.

If our campaign doesn't begin this critical election year with the strongest numbers possible, then I'm afraid Republican mega-donors and right-wing groups will think Minnesota is theirs for the taking.

That's why it's so important we hit our very first goal this year before the deadline. To compete with the GOP's massive war chest of special interest cash, we need a surge of grassroots contributions from folks like you. So, I'm asking:

**Can I count on you to donate toward our very first fundraising goal of the year before midnight on Thursday and help us stay on track for the month? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't so important.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200113-mm5?refcode=em200113-mm5&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

In order to take on the Republicans and save Minnesota's Senate seat, we need to build an organization that can win -- and that starts with staying on top of our fundraising benchmarks.

That's why your contribution matters so much today. Thanks for everything.

-- Tina
